portfolio.title: e-commerce website
portfolio.description: A full-featured e-commerce web app built using the MERN stack, offering product browsing, user authentication, cart management, and secure order handling. Designed with a responsive UI, smooth API integration, and a scalable backend for a seamless shopping experience.

portfolio.title: vendors management project
portfolio.description: A complete vendor onboarding and management platform built with Angular and PostgreSQL. It includes vendor registration, status tracking, role-based access, form validation, and an admin dashboard. Designed for efficient workflow, smooth UI, and secure backend API handling.
